acceptance_answers.can_notion_become_governed_connector: Yes, but current state is BLOCKED until API capability, workspace permission boundary, credential authority, production connector implementation, and audit evidence exist.

activation_boundary: Readiness, onboarding, package, or review evidence does not authorize Notion production activation or workspace mutation.
blocking_gaps: No Notion production API credentials or workspace authority evidence exists in PB-038/PB-039.
External workspace mutation requires human approval and has not been validated with real authority evidence.
connector_authority: Notion connector authority must be explicitly scoped to approved workspace/page/database actions and cannot override GitHub source-of-truth governance.
credential_authority: No production Notion credential authority exists yet; repository credential storage is forbidden.
database_authority: Database creation, schema changes, or record updates require explicit approval, schema diff evidence, rollback evidence, and audit receipt.
generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-071 assesses whether Notion can become a production-governed USBAY connector.

## RISK
Notion can change external workspace pages and databases. Without authority, approvals, audit receipts, rollback, and GitHub source mapping, Notion could drift from USBAY source-of-truth governance.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first engineering, human oversight, rollback and forensics, network governance, backend truth source-of-truth, and secret/data hygiene rules. GitHub PB-041 through PB-050, Codex PB-051 through PB-060, Control Plane PB-061 through PB-070, and PB-040 connector readiness evidence.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review are required before merge. This PB does not authorize production activation, Notion API calls, workspace mutations, page/database mutations, or credential creation.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
JSON evidence must parse. Generated metadata, connector authority, workspace authority, page authority, database authority, approval authority, audit authority, rollback authority, credential authority, fail-closed controls, activation boundary, evidence requirements, and required PR sections must validate.

## AUDIT
PB-071 generates notion_readiness_report.json and notion_readiness_summary.md.

## IMPACT
USBAY receives an evidence-bound Notion readiness status while production activation remains blocked.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW
page_authority: Page creation or update requires policy reference, approval reference, audit record, rollback path, and post-action receipt.
required_next_steps: Verify Notion API capability and workspace permission boundary.
Define human approval workflow for page/database mutations.
Implement read/write connector only after credential and audit authority are proven.
rollback_authority: USJAY77 under USBAY-AUDIT review until delegated authority exists
title: Notion Readiness Assessment
workspace_authority: No Notion workspace mutation is allowed until workspace authority, parent mapping, and human approval evidence exist.
